title: typedef inside module causes internal error
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 431 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-01-06
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

module ...
...
    typedef logic [6-1:0]                  six_bits;
...
endmodule

%Error: Internal Error: ...v:273: ../V3EmitC.cpp:630: Unknown node type reached emitter: RANGE
